notes: Reading spec, diff, and existing test harnesses

steps.label: 05 · Test review
steps.summary: 2 iterations: fixed approve-path regression + added AC5 dismiss & approve-wiring tests; 90 pytest green
notes: Reviewing 3 test suites against app.py handler + migration; auditing AC1-7 coverage

CHANGES REQUESTED: branch leaves test_ops_api.py RED (8 approve tests fail, AttributeError execute_finding_action on the shared fake); AC5 dismiss has zero coverage; approve->execute wiring only tested in isolation. New 3 suites (7 SQL + 10 py + 5 fe) pass.
Posted test review on PR #77 (CHANGES REQUESTED): 3 blockers (red test_ops_api suite / AC5 dismiss uncovered / approve-execute wiring isolation) + 2 weak-assertion notes.

Fixed CI red: added execute_finding_action + append_audit_event stubs to _FakeSupabaseClient in test_ops_api.py (8 approve tests green again). Added 4 handler tests: approve wires persisted finding to execute_finding_action (AC1-4), reject does not execute, dismiss persists rejected+disposition=dismissed, audits vehicle_finding_dismissed, no signal/no execute (AC5), dismiss-without-contract no-audit. pytest: 90 passed (test_ops_api 80 + execution 10). frontend 5/5. SQL layer env-blocked (shared supabase_db container absent this session).
Iteration 2: verifying tester fix 3df039f — running pytest + auditing dismiss/wiring assertions

Iteration 2 APPROVE: pytest 90 passed/0 failed (test_ops_api.py + test_finding_action_execution.py). All 3 prior blockers resolved with behavioural assertions through the real /api/ops/findings/decision endpoint. SQL contract suite fails only against unmigrated CI container (relation tenants missing) — environment-only, passed 7/7 against shared container previously.

steps.label: 06 · Code review
steps.summary: APPROVE after 2 fixes: seeded ops_audit_event fact type + markdown price guard; 95 pytest green
notes: Reviewer (diff): reading production diff in app.py + migration + frontend

Reviewer(diff): posted on PR#77 — 2 issues (Medium: ops_audit_event fact type never seeded -> all audit events silently dropped; Low/Med: markdown writes sale_price=0 on missing/non-numeric price). Core markdown+idempotency+RLS+SCD2 sound.
